search_pattern_in_files: search for a regex pattern across all files in a directory using ripgrep or python fallback
find_files_by_type: find all Python files matching a regex pattern in the project root directory
search_with_context: search for a string with up to 5 context lines around each match in content mode
case_insensitive_search: perform a case insensitive regex search across TypeScript files in a given path
count_matches: count the number of regex matches per file without showing full content output
